intervention.label: Mindful Walk
intervention.instructions: Five minutes, slow pace, no phone.

coach.llmText:
I'm not a medical professional, and I can't diagnose anything. If you're concerned about your health, please reach out to your doctor or clinician—they're the right person to talk to.

Right now, I'm noticing your stress signature is elevated. How about a five-minute mindful walk at a slow pace, no phone? It might help settle things. Want to try it?
